description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a striking color scheme of metallic gold and deep red. The headband is robust and padded on the underside for comfort, while the ear cups are large, circular, and cushioned with plush red padding. The exterior of the ear cups features a metallic gold finish, and one side displays visible control buttons, likely for playback and volume adjustment. The headphones appear to be wireless, as there are no visible cables, and the design suggests a modern, premium build. The overall construction combines metal, plastic, and synthetic leather, giving it a sleek and durable appearance suitable for urban use.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with metallic gold and deep red colors, featuring padded ear cups and a cushioned headband. One ear cup has visible control buttons, indicating wireless functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, padded red ear cups and the cushioned underside of the gold headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup and the solid gold headband arch.
description_view_2: Another front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the symmetrical design of the headphones.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the control buttons on the ear cup and the gold headband arch.
